A constructor parameter no provider supplies fails at emission.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

type Widget struct{}

//fabrik:http:middleware
func Unresolvable(w *Widget) func(http.Handler) http.Handler {
	return func(next http.Handler) http.Handler { return next }
}

//fabrik:http GET /
func Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/diags --
error: web/web.go:8:19: no provider or binding supplies this middleware constructor parameter
  help: declare a //fabrik:provider for it
